 41→
 42→private const val EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE = "post_list_type"
 43→private const val MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION = 2
 44→
 45→class PostListFragment : ViewPagerFragment() {
 46→    @Inject
 47→    internal lateinit var imageManager: ImageManager
 48→
 49→    @Inject
 50→    internal lateinit var viewModelFactory: ViewModelProvider.Factory
 51→
 52→    @Inject
 53→    internal lateinit var uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 54→    private lateinit var viewModel: PostListViewModel
 55→    private lateinit var mainViewModel: PostListMainViewModel
 56→
 57→    private var swipeToRefreshHelper: SwipeToRefreshHelper? = null
 58→
 59→    private var swipeRefreshLayout: CustomSwipeRefreshLayout? = null
 60→    private var recyclerView: RecyclerView? = null
 61→    private var actionableEmptyView: ActionableEmptyView? = null
 62→    private var progressLoadMore: ProgressBar? = null
 63→
 64→    private lateinit var itemDecorationCompactLayout: RecyclerItemDecoration
 65→    private lateinit var itemDecorationStandardLayout: RecyclerItemDecoration
 66→
 67→    private lateinit var postListType: PostListType
 68→
 69→    private lateinit var nonNullActivity: FragmentActivity
 70→
 71→    private val postListAdapter: PostListAdapter by lazy {
 72→        PostListAdapter(
 73→            context = nonNullActivity,
 74→            imageManager = imageManager,
 75→            uiHelpers = uiHelpers
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 80→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
 81→        nonNullActivity = requireActivity()
 82→        (nonNullActivity.application as WordPress).component().inject(this)
 83→
 84→        val nonNullIntent = checkNotNull(nonNullActivity.intent)
 85→        val site = nonNullIntent.getSerializableExtraCompat<SiteModel>(WordPress.SITE)
 86→
 87→        if (site == null) {
 88→            ToastUtils.showToast(nonNullActivity, R.string.blog_not_found, ToastUtils.Duration.SHORT)
 89→            nonNullActivity.finish()
 90→        }
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    override fun getScrollableViewForUniqueIdProvision(): View? {
 94→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
 95→            return null
 96→        }
 97→        return recyclerView
 98→    }
 99→
100→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
101→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
102→        postListType = requireNotNull(arguments?.getSerializableCompat(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE))
103→
104→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
105→            recyclerView?.id = R.id.posts_search_recycler_view_id
106→        }
107→
108→        mainViewModel = ViewModelProvider(nonNullActivity, viewModelFactory)[PostListMainViewModel::class.java]
109→
110→        mainViewModel.viewLayoutType.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer { optionaLayoutType ->
111→            optionaLayoutType?.let { layoutType ->
112→                recyclerView?.removeItemDecoration(itemDecorationCompactLayout)
113→                recyclerView?.removeItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
114→
115→                when (layoutType) {
116→                    STANDARD -> {
117→                        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationStandardLayout)
118→                    }
119→                    COMPACT -> {
120→                        recyclerView?.addItemDecoration(itemDecorationCompactLayout)
121→                    }
122→                }
123→
124→                if (postListAdapter.updateItemLayoutType(layoutType)) {
125→                    recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(0)
126→                }
127→            }
128→        })
129→
130→        mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.observe(viewLifecycleOwner) {
131→            if (it != null) {
132→                if (viewModel.updateAuthorFilterIfNotSearch(it)) {
133→                    recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(0)
134→                }
135→            }
136→        }
137→
138→        actionableEmptyView?.updateLayoutForSearch(postListType == SEARCH, 0)
139→
140→        val postListViewModelConnector = mainViewModel.getPostListViewModelConnector(postListType)
141→
142→        viewModel = ViewModelProvider(this, viewModelFactory)[PostListViewModel::class.java]
143→
144→        val displayWidth = DisplayUtils.getWindowPixelWidth(requireContext())
145→        val contentSpacing = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.content_margin)
146→
147→        // since the MainViewModel has been already started, we need to manually update the authorFilterSelection value
148→        viewModel.start(
149→            postListViewModelConnector,
150→            mainViewModel.authorSelectionUpdated.value!!,
151→            photonWidth = displayWidth - contentSpacing * 2,
152→            photonHeight = nonNullActivity.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.reader_featured_image_height)
153→        )
154→
155→        initObservers()
156→    }
157→
158→    private fun initObservers() {
159→        if (postListType == SEARCH) {
160→            mainViewModel.searchQuery.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
161→                if (TextUtils.isEmpty(it)) {
162→                    postListAdapter.submitList(null)
163→                }
164→                viewModel.search(it)
165→            })
166→        }
167→
168→        viewModel.emptyViewState.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
169→            it?.let { emptyViewState -> updateEmptyViewForState(emptyViewState) }
170→        })
171→
172→        viewModel.isFetchingFirstPage.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
173→            swipeRefreshLayout?.isRefreshing = it == true
174→        })
175→
176→        viewModel.pagedListData.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
177→            it?.let { pagedListData -> updatePagedListData(pagedListData) }
178→        })
179→
180→        viewModel.isLoadingMore.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
181→            progressLoadMore?.visibility = if (it == true) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
182→        })
183→        viewModel.scrollToPosition.observe(viewLifecycleOwner, Observer {
184→            it?.let { index ->
185→                recyclerView?.scrollToPosition(index)
186→            }
187→        })
188→    }
189→
190→    override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
191→        val view = inflater.inflate(R.layout.post_list_fragment, container, false)
192→
193→        swipeRefreshLayout = view.findViewById(R.id.ptr_layout)
194→        recyclerView = view.findViewById(R.id.recycler_view)
195→        progressLoadMore = view.findViewById(R.id.progress)
196→        actionableEmptyView = view.findViewById(R.id.actionable_empty_view)
197→
198→        val context = nonNullActivity
199→        itemDecorationStandardLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
200→            0,
201→            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.margin_medium)
202→        )
203→        itemDecorationCompactLayout = RecyclerItemDecoration(
204→            0,
205→            context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.list_divider_height)
206→        )
207→        recyclerView?.layoutManager = LinearLayoutManager(context)
208→        recyclerView?.adapter = postListAdapter
209→
210→        swipeRefreshLayout?.let {
211→            swipeToRefreshHelper = buildSwipeToRefreshHelper(it) {
212→                if (!NetworkUtils.isNetworkAvailable(nonNullActivity)) {
213→                    it.isRefreshing = false
214→                } else {
215→                    viewModel.swipeToRefresh()
216→                }
217→            }
218→        }
219→        return view
220→    }
221→
222→    /**
223→     * Updates the data for the adapter while retaining visible item in certain cases.
224→     *
225→     * PagedList tries to keep the visible item by adding new items outside of the screen while modifying the scroll
226→     * position. In most cases, this works out great because it doesn't interrupt to the user. However, after a new
227→     * item is inserted at the top while the list is showing the very first items, it feels very weird to not have the
228→     * inserted item shown. For example, if a new draft is added there is no indication of it except for the flash
229→     * of the scroll bar which is not noticeable unless user is paying attention to it.
230→     *
231→     * In these cases, we try to keep the scroll position the same instead of keeping the visible item the same by
232→     * first saving the state and re-applying it after the data updates are completed. Since `PagedListAdapter` uses
233→     * bg thread to calculate the changes, we need to post the change in the bg thread as well so that it'll be applied
234→     * after changes are reflected.
235→     */
236→    private fun updatePagedListData(pagedListData: PagedPostList) {
237→        val recyclerViewState = recyclerView?.layoutManager?.onSaveInstanceState()
238→        postListAdapter.submitList(pagedListData)
239→        recyclerView?.post {
240→            (recyclerView?.layoutManager as? LinearLayoutManager)?.let { layoutManager ->
241→                if (layoutManager.findFirstVisibleItemPosition() < MAX_INDEX_FOR_VISIBLE_ITEM_TO_KEEP_SCROLL_POSITION) {
242→                    layoutManager.onRestoreInstanceState(recyclerViewState)
243→                }
244→            }
245→        }
246→    }
247→
248→    private fun updateEmptyViewForState(state: PostListEmptyUiState) {
249→        actionableEmptyView?.let { emptyView ->
250→            if (state.emptyViewVisible) {
251→                emptyView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
252→                uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(emptyView.title, state.title)
253→                uiHelpers.setImageOrHide(emptyView.image, state.imgResId)
254→                setupButtonOrHide(emptyView.button, state.buttonText, state.onButtonClick)
255→            } else {
256→                emptyView.visibility = View.GONE
257→            }
258→        }
259→    }
260→
261→    private fun setupButtonOrHide(
262→        buttonView: Button,
263→        text: UiString?,
264→        onButtonClick: (() -> Unit)?
265→    ) {
266→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(buttonView, text)
267→        buttonView.setOnClickListener { onButtonClick?.invoke() }
268→    }
269→
270→    fun scrollToTargetPost(localPostId: LocalPostId) {
271→        viewModel.scrollToPost(localPostId)
272→    }
273→
274→    companion object {
275→        const val TAG = "post_list_fragment_tag"
276→
277→        @JvmStatic
278→        fun newInstance(
279→            site: SiteModel,
280→            postListType: PostListType
281→        ): PostListFragment {
282→            val fragment = PostListFragment()
283→            val bundle = Bundle()
284→            bundle.putSerializable(WordPress.SITE, site)
285→            bundle.putSerializable(EXTRA_POST_LIST_TYPE, postListType)
286→            fragment.arguments = bundle
287→            return fragment
288→        }
289→    }
290→}

 60→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListViewModelConnector

 62→import javax.inject.Named
 63→import kotlin.coroutines.CoroutineContext
 64→
 65→private const val SCROLL_TO_DELAY = 50L
 66→private const val SEARCH_COLLAPSE_DELAY = 500L
 67→private val FAB_VISIBLE_POST_LIST_PAGES = listOf(PUBLISHED, DRAFTS, SCHEDULED, TRASHED)
 68→val POST_LIST_PAGES = listOf(PUBLISHED, DRAFTS, SCHEDULED, TRASHED)
 69→private const val TRACKS_SELECTED_TAB = "selected_tab"
 70→private const val TRACKS_SELECTED_AUTHOR_FILTER = "author_filter_selection"
 71→private const val TRACKS_ACTION = "action"
 72→private const val TRACKS_CREATE_NEW_POST = "create_new_post"
 73→
 74→class PostListMainViewModel @Inject constructor(
 75→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 76→    private val postStore: PostStore,
 77→    private val accountStore: AccountStore,
 78→    uploadActionUseCase: UploadActionUseCase,
 79→    uploadStore: UploadStore,
 80→    mediaStore: MediaStore,
 81→    private val networkUtilsWrapper: NetworkUtilsWrapper,
 82→    private val prefs: AppPrefsWrapper,
 83→    private val postListEventListenerFactory: PostListEventListener.Factory,
 84→    private val previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 85→    private val analyticsTracker: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 86→    private val savePostToDbUseCase: SavePostToDbUseCase,
 87→    @Named(UI_THREAD) private val mainDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 88→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 89→    private val uploadStarter: UploadStarter
 90→) : ViewModel(), CoroutineScope {
 91→    private val lifecycleOwner = object : LifecycleOwner {
 92→        val lifecycleRegistry = LifecycleRegistry(this)
 93→        override val lifecycle: Lifecycle = lifecycleRegistry
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    private val scrollToTargetPostJob: Job = Job()
 97→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 98→        get() = bgDispatcher + scrollToTargetPostJob
 99→
100→    private lateinit var site: SiteModel
101→    private lateinit var editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
102→    var currentBottomSheetPostId: LocalId? = null
103→
104→    private val _viewState = MutableLiveData<PostListMainViewState>()
105→    val viewState: LiveData<PostListMainViewState> = _viewState
106→
107→    private val _postListAction = SingleLiveEvent<PostListAction>()
108→    val postListAction: LiveData<PostListAction> = _postListAction
109→
110→    private val _authorSelectionUpdated = MutableLiveData<AuthorFilterSelection>()
111→    val authorSelectionUpdated = _authorSelectionUpdated
112→
113→    private val _selectTab = SingleLiveEvent<Int>()
114→    val selectTab = _selectTab as LiveData<Int>
115→
116→    private val _scrollToLocalPostId = SingleLiveEvent<LocalPostId>()
117→    val scrollToLocalPostId = _scrollToLocalPostId as LiveData<LocalPostId>
118→
119→    private val _openPrepublishingBottomSheet = MutableLiveData<Event<Unit>>()
120→    val openPrepublishingBottomSheet: LiveData<Event<Unit>> = _openPrepublishingBottomSheet
121→
122→    private val _snackBarMessage = SingleLiveEvent<SnackbarMessageHolder>()
123→    val snackBarMessage = _snackBarMessage as LiveData<SnackbarMessageHolder>
124→
125→    private val _previewState = SingleLiveEvent<PostListRemotePreviewState>()
126→    val previewState = _previewState as LiveData<PostListRemotePreviewState>
127→
128→    private val _toastMessage = SingleLiveEvent<ToastMessageHolder>()
129→    val toastMessage: LiveData<ToastMessageHolder> = _toastMessage
130→
131→    private val _dialogAction = SingleLiveEvent<DialogHolder>()
132→    val dialogAction: LiveData<DialogHolder> = _dialogAction
133→
134→    private val _postUploadAction = SingleLiveEvent<PostUploadAction>()
135→    val postUploadAction: LiveData<PostUploadAction> = _postUploadAction
136→
137→    private val _viewLayoutType = MutableLiveData<PostListViewLayoutType>()
138→    val viewLayoutType: LiveData<PostListViewLayoutType> = _viewLayoutType
139→
140→    private val _viewLayoutTypeMenuUiState = MutableLiveData<PostListViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState>()
141→    val viewLayoutTypeMenuUiState: LiveData<PostListViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState> = _viewLayoutTypeMenuUiState
142→
143→    private val _isSearchExpanded = MutableLiveData<Boolean>()
144→    val isSearchExpanded: LiveData<Boolean> = _isSearchExpanded
145→
146→    private val _searchQuery = MutableLiveData<String?>()
147→    val searchQuery: LiveData<String?> = _searchQuery
148→
149→    private val uploadStatusTracker = PostModelUploadStatusTracker(
150→        uploadStore = uploadStore,
151→        uploadActionUseCase = uploadActionUseCase
152→    )
153→    private val featuredImageTracker = PostListFeaturedImageTracker(dispatcher = dispatcher, mediaStore = mediaStore)
154→
155→    private val postFetcher by lazy {
156→        PostFetcher(lifecycleOwner.lifecycle, dispatcher)
157→    }
158→
159→    private val postListDialogHelper: PostListDialogHelper by lazy {
160→        PostListDialogHelper(
161→            showDialog = { _dialogAction.postValue(it) },
162→            checkNetworkConnection = this::checkNetworkConnection,
163→            analyticsTracker = analyticsTracker
164→        )
165→    }
166→
167→    private val postConflictResolver: PostConflictResolver by lazy {
168→        PostConflictResolver(
169→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
170→            site = site,
171→            getPostByLocalPostId = postStore::getPostByLocalPostId,
172→            invalidateList = this::invalidateAllLists,

175→            showToast = { _toastMessage.postValue(it) }
176→        )
177→    }
178→
179→    private val postActionHandler: PostActionHandler by lazy {
180→        PostActionHandler(
181→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
182→            site = site,
183→            postStore = postStore,
184→            postListDialogHelper = postListDialogHelper,
185→            doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict = postConflictResolver::doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict,
186→            hasUnhandledAutoSave = postConflictResolver::hasUnhandledAutoSave,
187→            triggerPostListAction = { _postListAction.postValue(it) },
188→            triggerPostUploadAction = { _postUploadAction.postValue(it) },
189→            triggerPublishAction = this::showPrepublishingBottomSheet,
190→            invalidateList = this::invalidateAllLists,
191→            checkNetworkConnection = this::checkNetworkConnection,
192→            showSnackbar = { _snackBarMessage.postValue(it) },
193→            showToast = { _toastMessage.postValue(it) },
194→            triggerPreviewStateUpdate = this::updatePreviewAndDialogState,
195→            copyPost = this::copyPost
196→        )
197→    }
198→
199→    fun copyPost(site: SiteModel, postToCopy: PostModel, performChecks: Boolean = false) {
200→        if (performChecks && (postConflictResolver.doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict(postToCopy) ||
201→                    postConflictResolver.hasUnhandledAutoSave(postToCopy))
202→        ) {
203→            postListDialogHelper.showCopyConflictDialog(postToCopy)
204→            return
205→        }
206→        val post = postStore.instantiatePostModel(
207→            site,
208→            false,
209→            postToCopy.title,
210→            postToCopy.content,
211→            PostStatus.DRAFT.toString(),
212→            postToCopy.categoryIdList,
213→            postToCopy.postFormat,
214→            true
215→        )
216→        _postListAction.postValue(PostListAction.EditPost(site, post, loadAutoSaveRevision = false))
217→    }
218→
219→    /**
220→     * Filtering by author is disable on:
221→     * 1) Self-hosted sites - The XMLRPC api doesn't support filtering by author.
222→     * 2) Jetpack sites - we need to pass in the self-hosted user id to be able to filter for authors
223→     * which we currently can't
224→     * 3) Sites on which the user doesn't have permissions to edit posts of other users.
225→     *
226→     * This behavior is consistent with Calypso as of 11/4/2019.
227→     */
228→    private val isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean by lazy {
229→        site.isWPCom && site.hasCapabilityEditOthersPosts && !site.isSingleUserSite
230→    }
231→
232→    init {
233→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.CREATED
234→    }
235→
236→    @Suppress("LongMethod")
237→    fun start(
238→        site: SiteModel,
239→        initPreviewState: PostListRemotePreviewState,
240→        currentBottomSheetPostId: LocalId,
241→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
242→    ) {
243→        this.site = site
244→        this.editPostRepository = editPostRepository
245→
246→        if (isSearchExpanded.value == true) {
247→            setViewLayoutAndIcon(COMPACT, false)
248→        } else {
249→            setUserPreferredViewLayoutType()
250→        }
251→
252→        val authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection = if (isFilteringByAuthorSupported) {
253→            prefs.postListAuthorSelection
254→        } else {
255→            AuthorFilterSelection.EVERYONE
256→        }
257→
258→        postListEventListenerFactory.createAndStartListening(
259→            lifecycle = lifecycleOwner.lifecycle,
260→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
261→            bgDispatcher = bgDispatcher,
262→            postStore = postStore,
263→            site = site,
264→            postActionHandler = postActionHandler,
265→            handlePostUpdatedWithoutError = postConflictResolver::onPostSuccessfullyUpdated,
266→            handlePostUploadedWithoutError = {
267→                refreshAllLists()
268→            },
269→            triggerPostUploadAction = { _postUploadAction.postValue(it) },
270→            invalidateUploadStatus = {
271→                uploadStatusTracker.invalidateUploadStatus(it)
272→                invalidateAllLists()
273→            },
274→            invalidateFeaturedMedia = {
275→                featuredImageTracker.invalidateFeaturedMedia(it)
276→                invalidateAllLists()
277→            },
278→            triggerPreviewStateUpdate = this::updatePreviewAndDialogState,
279→            isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList = this::isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList,
280→            hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError = this::hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError
281→        )
282→
283→        _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
284→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
285→            isFabVisible = FAB_VISIBLE_POST_LIST_PAGES.contains(POST_LIST_PAGES.first()) &&
286→                    isSearchExpanded.value != true,
287→            isAuthorFilterVisible = isFilteringByAuthorSupported,
288→            authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection,
289→            authorFilterItems = getAuthorFilterItems(authorFilterSelection, accountStore.account?.avatarUrl)
290→        )
291→        _previewState.value = _previewState.value ?: initPreviewState
292→
293→        currentBottomSheetPostId.let { postId ->
294→            if (postId.value != 0) {
295→                editPostRepository.loadPostByLocalPostId(postId.value)
296→            }
297→        }
298→
299→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.STARTED
300→
301→        uploadStarter.queueUploadFromSite(site)
302→
303→        editPostRepository.run {
304→            postChanged.observe(lifecycleOwner, Observer {
305→                savePostToDbUseCase.savePostToDb(editPostRepository, site)
306→            })
307→        }
308→    }
309→
310→    override fun onCleared() {
311→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycleRegistry.currentState = Lifecycle.State.DESTROYED
312→        scrollToTargetPostJob.cancel() // cancels all coroutines with the default coroutineContext
313→        super.onCleared()
314→    }
315→
316→    /*
317→     * FUTURE_REFACTOR: We shouldn't need to pass the AuthorFilterSelection to fragments and get it back, we have that
318→     * info already
319→     */
320→    fun getPostListViewModelConnector(
321→        postListType: PostListType
322→    ): PostListViewModelConnector {
323→        return PostListViewModelConnector(
324→            site = site,
325→            postListType = postListType,
326→            postActionHandler = postActionHandler,
327→            uploadStatusTracker = uploadStatusTracker,
328→            doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict = postConflictResolver::doesPostHaveUnhandledConflict,
329→            hasAutoSave = postConflictResolver::hasUnhandledAutoSave,
330→            postFetcher = postFetcher,
331→            getFeaturedImageUrl = featuredImageTracker::getFeaturedImageUrl
332→        )
333→    }
334→
335→    fun onSearchExpanded(restorePreviousSearch: Boolean) {
336→        if (isSearchExpanded.value != true) {
337→            setViewLayoutAndIcon(COMPACT, false)
338→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(POST_LIST_SEARCH_ACCESSED, site)
339→
340→            if (!restorePreviousSearch) {
341→                clearSearch()
342→            }
343→
344→            _isSearchExpanded.value = true
345→            _viewState.value = _viewState.value?.copy(isFabVisible = false)
346→        }
347→    }
348→
349→    fun onSearchCollapsed(delay: Long = SEARCH_COLLAPSE_DELAY) {
350→        setUserPreferredViewLayoutType()
351→        _isSearchExpanded.value = false
352→        clearSearch()
353→
354→        launch {
355→            delay(delay)
356→            withContext(mainDispatcher) {
357→                _viewState.value = _viewState.value?.copy(isFabVisible = true)
358→            }
359→        }
360→    }
361→
362→    fun onSearch(searchQuery: String) {
363→        _searchQuery.value = searchQuery
364→    }
365→
366→    private fun clearSearch() {
367→        _searchQuery.value = null
368→    }
369→
370→    fun fabClicked() {
371→        analyticsTracker.track(POST_LIST_CREATE_POST_TAPPED,
372→            mapOf(TRACKS_ACTION to TRACKS_CREATE_NEW_POST )
373→        )
374→
375→        postActionHandler.newPost()
376→    }
377→
378→    fun updateAuthorFilterSelection(selectionId: Long) {
379→        val selection = AuthorFilterSelection.fromId(selectionId)
380→
381→        updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
382→            authorFilterSelection = selection,
383→            authorFilterItems = getAuthorFilterItems(selection, accountStore.account?.avatarUrl)
384→        )
385→        if (isFilteringByAuthorSupported) {
386→            prefs.postListAuthorSelection = selection
387→        }
388→    }
389→
390→    fun onTabChanged(position: Int) {
391→        val currentPage = POST_LIST_PAGES[position]
392→        updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(isFabVisible = FAB_VISIBLE_POST_LIST_PAGES.contains(currentPage))
393→
394→        AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
395→            POST_LIST_TAB_CHANGED,
396→            site,
397→            mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_TAB to currentPage.toString() as Any)
398→        )
399→    }
400→
401→    fun showTargetPost(targetPostId: Int) {
402→        val postModel = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(targetPostId)
403→        if (postModel == null) {
404→            _snackBarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_post_does_not_exist))
405→        } else {
406→            launch(mainDispatcher) {
407→                val targetTab = PostListType.fromPostStatus(PostStatus.fromPost(postModel))
408→                _selectTab.value = POST_LIST_PAGES.indexOf(targetTab)
409→                // we need to make sure the ViewPager initializes the targetTab fragment before we can propagate
410→                // the targetPostId to it
411→                withContext(bgDispatcher) {
412→                    delay(SCROLL_TO_DELAY)
413→                }
414→                _scrollToLocalPostId.value = LocalPostId(LocalId(postModel.id))
415→            }
416→        }
417→    }
418→
419→    fun handleEditPostResult(data: Intent?) {

421→    }
422→
423→    private fun editRestoredAutoSavePost(localPostId: Int) {
424→        val post = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(localPostId)
425→        if (post != null) {
426→            _postListAction.postValue(PostListAction.EditPost(site, post, loadAutoSaveRevision = true))
427→        } else {

429→        }
430→    }

436→        } else {

438→        }
439→    }

442→        val post = postStore.getPostByLocalPostId(localPostId)
443→        if (post != null) {
444→            copyPost(site, post)
445→        } else {
446→            _snackBarMessage.value = SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_post_does_not_exist))
447→        }
448→    }

450→    // BasicFragmentDialog Events
451→
452→    fun onPositiveClickedForBasicDialog(instanceTag: String) {
453→        postListDialogHelper.onPositiveClickedForBasicDialog(
454→            instanceTag = instanceTag,
455→            trashPostWithLocalChanges = postActionHandler::trashPostWithLocalChanges,
456→            trashPostWithUnsavedChanges = postActionHandler::trashPostWithUnsavedChanges,
457→            deletePost = postActionHandler::deletePost,
458→            publishPost = postActionHandler::publishPost,
459→            updateConflictedPostWithRemoteVersion = postConflictResolver::updateConflictedPostWithRemoteVersion,
460→            editRestoredAutoSavePost = this::editRestoredAutoSavePost,
461→            moveTrashedPostToDraft = postActionHandler::moveTrashedPostToDraft,
462→            resolveConflictsAndEditPost = postActionHandler::resolveConflictsAndEditPost
463→        )
464→    }
465→
466→    fun onNegativeClickedForBasicDialog(instanceTag: String) {
467→        postListDialogHelper.onNegativeClickedForBasicDialog(
468→            instanceTag = instanceTag,
469→            updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion = postConflictResolver::updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion,
470→            editLocalPost = this::editLocalPost,
471→            copyLocalPost = this::copyLocalPost
472→        )
473→    }
474→
475→    fun onDismissByOutsideTouchForBasicDialog(instanceTag: String) {
476→        postListDialogHelper.onDismissByOutsideTouchForBasicDialog(
477→            instanceTag = instanceTag,
478→            updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion = postConflictResolver::updateConflictedPostWithLocalVersion,
479→            editLocalPost = this::editLocalPost,
480→            copyLocalPost = this::copyLocalPost
481→        )
482→    }
483→
484→    private fun showPrepublishingBottomSheet(post: PostModel) {
485→        currentBottomSheetPostId = LocalId(post.id)
486→        editPostRepository.loadPostByLocalPostId(post.id)
487→        _openPrepublishingBottomSheet.postValue(Event(Unit))
488→    }
489→
490→    /**
491→     * Only the non-null variables will be changed in the current state
492→     */
493→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
494→    private fun updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange(
495→        isFabVisible: Boolean? = null,
496→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean? = null,
497→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection? = null,
498→        authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>? = null
499→    ) {
500→        val currentState = requireNotNull(viewState.value) {
501→            "updateViewStateTriggerPagerChange should not be called before the initial state is set"
502→        }
503→
504→        _viewState.value = PostListMainViewState(
505→            isFabVisible ?: currentState.isFabVisible,
506→            isAuthorFilterVisible ?: currentState.isAuthorFilterVisible,
507→            authorFilterSelection ?: currentState.authorFilterSelection,
508→            authorFilterItems ?: currentState.authorFilterItems
509→        )
510→
511→        if (authorFilterSelection != null && currentState.authorFilterSelection != authorFilterSelection) {
512→            _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
513→
514→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(
515→                POST_LIST_AUTHOR_FILTER_CHANGED,
516→                site,
517→                mutableMapOf(TRACKS_SELECTED_AUTHOR_FILTER to authorFilterSelection.toString() as Any)
518→            )
519→        }
520→    }
521→
522→    private fun invalidateAllLists() {
523→        val listTypeIdentifier = PostListDescriptor.calculateTypeIdentifier(site.id)
524→        dispatcher.dispatch(ListActionBuilder.newListDataInvalidatedAction(listTypeIdentifier))
525→    }
526→
527→    private fun refreshAllLists() {
528→        val listTypeIdentifier = PostListDescriptor.calculateTypeIdentifier(site.id)
529→        dispatcher.dispatch(ListActionBuilder.newListRequiresRefreshAction(listTypeIdentifier))
530→    }
531→
532→    private fun isRemotePreviewingFromPostsList() = _previewState.value != null &&
533→            _previewState.value != PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE
534→
535→    private fun hasRemoteAutoSavePreviewError() = _previewState.value != null &&
536→            _previewState.value == PostListRemotePreviewState.REMOTE_AUTO_SAVE_PREVIEW_ERROR
537→
538→    private fun checkNetworkConnection(): Boolean =
539→        if (networkUtilsWrapper.isNetworkAvailable()) {
540→            true
541→        } else {
542→            _toastMessage.postValue(ToastMessageHolder(R.string.no_network_message, Duration.SHORT))
543→            false
544→        }
545→
546→    fun handleRemotePreviewClosing() {
547→        updatePreviewAndDialogState(PostListRemotePreviewState.NONE, PostInfoType.PostNoInfo)
548→    }
549→
550→    private fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
551→        // We need only transitions, so...
552→        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
553→
554→        AppLog.d(
555→            AppLog.T.POSTS,
556→            "Posts list preview state machine: transition from ${_previewState.value} to $newState"
557→        )
558→
559→        // update the state
560→        val prevState = _previewState.value
561→        _previewState.postValue(newState)
562→
563→        // take care of exit actions on state transition
564→        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
565→            newState,
566→            prevState,
567→            postInfo,
568→            postActionHandler::handleRemotePreview
569→        )
570→    }
571→
572→    fun toggleViewLayout() {
573→        val currentLayoutType = viewLayoutType.value ?: PostListViewLayoutType.defaultValue
574→        val toggledValue = when (currentLayoutType) {
575→            STANDARD -> COMPACT
576→            COMPACT -> STANDARD
577→        }
578→        AnalyticsUtils.trackAnalyticsPostListToggleLayout(toggledValue)
579→        setViewLayoutAndIcon(toggledValue, true)
580→    }
581→
582→    private fun setViewLayoutAndIcon(layout: PostListViewLayoutType, storeIntoPreferences: Boolean = true) {
583→        _viewLayoutType.value = layout
584→        _viewLayoutTypeMenuUiState.value = when (layout) {
585→            STANDARD -> StandardViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState
586→            COMPACT -> CompactViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState
587→        }
588→        if (storeIntoPreferences) {
589→            prefs.postListViewLayoutType = layout
590→        }
591→    }
592→
593→    private fun setUserPreferredViewLayoutType() {
594→        val savedLayoutType = prefs.postListViewLayoutType
595→        setViewLayoutAndIcon(savedLayoutType, false)
596→    }
597→
598→    fun onBottomSheetPublishButtonClicked() {
599→        editPostRepository.getEditablePost()?.let {
600→            postActionHandler.publishPost(it)
601→        }
602→    }
603→
604→    fun refreshUiStateForAuthorFilter() {
605→        _viewState.value = _viewState.value?.copy()
606→    }
607→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
 2→
 3→import androidx.annotation.DrawableRes
 4→import org.wordpress.android.R
 5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.AuthorFilterSelection.EVERYONE
 6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.AuthorFilterSelection.ME
 7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 9→
10→data class PostListMainViewState(
11→    val isFabVisible: Boolean,
12→    val isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean,
13→    val authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
14→    val authorFilterItems: List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState>
15→)
16→
17→sealed class PostListViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState(@DrawableRes val iconRes: Int, val title: UiString) {
18→    object StandardViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState : PostListViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState(
19→        iconRes = R.drawable.ic_view_post_compact_white_24dp,
20→        title = UiStringRes(R.string.post_list_toggle_item_layout_list_view)
21→    )
22→
23→    object CompactViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState : PostListViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState(
24→        iconRes = R.drawable.ic_view_post_full_white_24dp,
25→        title = UiStringRes(R.string.post_list_toggle_item_layout_cards_view)
26→    )
27→}
28→
29→sealed class AuthorFilterListItemUIState(
30→    val id: Long,
31→    val text: UiString,
32→    open val isSelected: Boolean
33→) {
34→    data class Everyone(override val isSelected: Boolean, @DrawableRes val imageRes: Int) :
35→        AuthorFilterListItemUIState(
36→            id = EVERYONE.id,
37→            text = UiStringRes(R.string.everyone),
38→            isSelected = isSelected
39→        )
40→
41→    data class Me(val avatarUrl: String?, override val isSelected: Boolean) :
42→        AuthorFilterListItemUIState(
43→            id = ME.id,
44→            text = UiStringRes(R.string.me),
45→            isSelected = isSelected
46→        )
47→}
48→
49→fun getAuthorFilterItems(
50→    selection: AuthorFilterSelection,
51→    avatarUrl: String?
52→): List<AuthorFilterListItemUIState> {
53→    return AuthorFilterSelection.values().map { value ->
54→        when (value) {
55→            ME -> AuthorFilterListItemUIState.Me(avatarUrl, selection == value)
56→            EVERYONE -> AuthorFilterListItemUIState.Everyone(
57→                selection == value,
58→                R.drawable.ic_people_white_24dp
59→            )
60→        }
61→    }
62→}
63→

 43→import android.R as AndroidR
 44→
 45→const val POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING = 8
 46→
 47→sealed class PostListItemViewHolder(
 48→    @LayoutRes layout: Int,
 49→    parent: ViewGroup,
 50→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
 51→    private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 52→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 53→    private val featuredImageView: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.image_featured)
 54→    private val titleTextView: WPTextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.title)
 55→    private val postInfoTextView: WPTextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.post_info)

 59→    private val container: ConstraintLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.container)
 60→    private val selectableBackground: Drawable? = parent.context.getDrawableFromAttribute(
 61→        AndroidR.attr.selectableItemBackground
 62→    )
 63→
 64→    /**
 65→     * Url of an image loaded in the `featuredImageView`.
 66→     */
 67→    private var loadedFeaturedImgUrl: String? = null
 68→
 69→    companion object {
 70→        var isClickEnabled = AtomicBoolean(true)
 71→    }
 72→
 73→    abstract fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState)
 74→
 75→    class Standard(
 76→        parent: ViewGroup,
 77→        imageManager: ImageManager,
 78→        private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 79→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
 80→        private val excerptTextView: WPTextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.excerpt)
 81→        private val actionButtons: List<PostListButton> = listOf(
 82→            itemView.findViewById(R.id.btn_primary),
 83→            itemView.findViewById(R.id.btn_secondary),
 84→            itemView.findViewById(R.id.btn_ternary)
 85→        )
 86→
 87→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
 88→            setBasicValues(item.data)
 89→
 90→            uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(excerptTextView, item.data.excerpt)
 91→            itemView.setOnClickListener {
 92→                if (isSafeClick(it)) {
 93→                    item.onSelected.invoke()
 94→                }
 95→            }
 96→
 97→            actionButtons.forEachIndexed { index, button ->
 98→                updateMenuItem(button, item.actions.getOrNull(index))
 99→            }
100→        }
101→
102→        private fun updateMenuItem(postListButton: PostListButton, action: PostListItemAction?) {
103→            uiHelpers.updateVisibility(postListButton, action != null)
104→            if (action != null) {
105→                when (action) {
106→                    is SingleItem -> {
107→                        postListButton.updateButtonType(action.buttonType)
108→                        postListButton.setOnClickListener {
109→                            if (isSafeClick(it)) {
110→                                action.onButtonClicked.invoke(action.buttonType)
111→                            }
112→                        }
113→                    }
114→                    is MoreItem -> {
115→                        postListButton.updateButtonType(action.buttonType)
116→                        postListButton.setOnClickListener { view ->
117→                            action.onButtonClicked.invoke(action.buttonType)
118→                            onMoreClicked(action.actions, view)
119→                        }
120→                    }
121→                }
122→            }
123→        }
124→
125→        // Purpose of this method is to prevent 2 Editors
126→        // from being launched simultaneously and then producing a crash
127→        private fun isSafeClick(view: View): Boolean {
128→            if (isClickEnabled.getAndSet(false)) {
129→                view.postDelayed({
130→                    isClickEnabled.set(true)
131→                }, 1000)
132→                return true
133→            }
134→            return false
135→        }
136→    }
137→
138→    class Compact(
139→        parent: ViewGroup,
140→        imageManager: ImageManager,
141→        private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
142→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item_compact, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
143→        private val moreButton: ImageButton = itemView.findViewById(R.id.more_button)
144→
145→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
146→            setBasicValues(item.data)
147→
148→            itemView.setOnClickListener { item.onSelected.invoke() }
149→            uiHelpers.updateVisibility(moreButton, item.compactActions.actions.isNotEmpty())
150→            moreButton.expandTouchTargetArea(R.dimen.post_list_more_button_extra_padding)
151→            moreButton.setOnClickListener { onMoreClicked(item.compactActions.actions, moreButton) }
152→        }
153→    }
154→
155→    protected fun setBasicValues(data: PostListItemUiStateData) {
156→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(titleTextView, data.title)
157→        updatePostInfoLabel(postInfoTextView, data.postInfo)
158→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(statusesTextView, data.statuses.isNotEmpty())
159→        updateStatusesLabel(statusesTextView, data.statuses, data.statusesDelimiter, data.statusesColor)
160→        showFeaturedImage(data.imageUrl)
161→        updateProgressBarState(data.progressBarUiState)
162→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(disabledOverlay, data.showOverlay)
163→        if (data.disableRippleEffect) {
164→            container.background = null
165→        } else {
166→            container.background = selectableBackground
167→        }
168→    }
169→
170→    private fun updatePostInfoLabel(view: TextView, uiStrings: List<UiString>?) {
171→        val concatenatedText = uiStrings?.joinToString(separator = "  ·  ") {
172→            uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it)
173→        }
174→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(view, concatenatedText)
175→    }
176→
177→    protected fun onMoreClicked(actions: List<PostListItemAction>, v: View) {
178→        val menu = PopupMenu(v.context, v)
179→        actions.forEach { singleItemAction ->
180→            val menuItem = menu.menu.add(
181→                Menu.NONE,
182→                singleItemAction.buttonType.value,
183→                Menu.NONE,
184→                getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(v.context, singleItemAction)
185→            )
186→            menuItem.setOnMenuItemClickListener {
187→                singleItemAction.onButtonClicked.invoke(singleItemAction.buttonType)
188→                true
189→            }
190→        }
191→        menu.show()
192→    }
193→
194→    private fun updateProgressBarState(progressBarUiState: ProgressBarUiState) {
195→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(uploadProgressBar, progressBarUiState.visibility)
196→        when (progressBarUiState) {
197→            is ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate -> uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = true
198→            is ProgressBarUiState.Determinate -> {
199→                uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = false
200→                uploadProgressBar.progress = progressBarUiState.progress
201→            }
202→            is ProgressBarUiState.Hidden -> Unit // Do nothing
203→        }
204→    }
205→
206→    private fun updateStatusesLabel(
207→        view: WPTextView,
208→        statuses: List<UiString>,
209→        delimiter: UiString,
210→        @ColorRes color: Int?
211→    ) {
212→        val separator = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, delimiter)
213→        view.text = statuses.joinToString(separator) { uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it) }
214→        color?.let { statusColor ->
215→            view.setTextColor(
216→                ContextCompat.getColor(
217→                    itemView.context,
218→                    statusColor
219→                )
220→            )
221→        }
222→    }
223→
224→    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
225→        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
226→            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
227→            return
228→        }
229→        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
230→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
231→            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
232→        } else {
233→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
234→            imageManager.load(featuredImageView, ImageType.PHOTO, imageUrl, ScaleType.CENTER_CROP)
235→        }
236→        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
240→        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
241→        if (color != 0) {
242→            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
243→            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
244→        }
245→        return wrappedDrawable
246→    }
247→
248→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
249→    private fun getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(context: Context, item: PostListItemAction): SpannableStringBuilder {
250→        var icon: Drawable? = setTint(
251→            context,
252→            context.getDrawable(item.buttonType.iconResId)!!, item.buttonType.colorAttrId
253→        )
254→        // If there's no icon, we insert a transparent one to keep the title aligned with the items which have icons.
255→        if (icon == null) icon = ColorDrawable(Color.TRANSPARENT)
256→        val iconSize: Int = context.getResources().getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_icon_size)
257→        icon.setBounds(0, 0, iconSize, iconSize)
258→        val imageSpan = ImageSpan(icon)
259→
260→        // Add a space placeholder for the icon, before the title.
261→        val menuTitle = context.getText(item.buttonType.textResId)
262→        val ssb = SpannableStringBuilder(
263→            menuTitle.padStart(menuTitle.length + POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING)
264→        )
265→
266→        // Replace the space placeholder with the icon.
267→        ssb.setSpan(imageSpan, 1, 2, 0)
268→        return ssb
269→    }
270→}

conversationHistory.content:
Now I understand the issue! The crash occurs because:

1. `getCardStates()` conditionally builds a list of cards (some cards may not be included based on site capabilities)
2. `CardType` enum defines `order` values (0-6), but the actual list size may be smaller
3. `updateCardState()` tries to access `currentCards[cardType.order]` which can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when a card with a higher order isn't in the list

For example, if BLOGGING_PROMPTS (order 6) isn't in the list, the list has size 6 (or less), trying to access index 6 crashes.

The fix is to use the index of the found card rather than `cardType.order`:

182→        val updated = currentCards.find { it.cardType == cardType }!!.copy(enabled = enabled)
183→        currentCards[cardType.order] = updated

Perfect! The fix has been applied successfully. Let me verify the changes are correct:

## Analysis of the Issue

**Root Cause:**
The crash was caused by a mismatch between the `CardType.order` enum values and the actual list size in `updateCardState()`. 

In the `CardType` enum:
- BLOGGING_PROMPTS has `order = 6`

However, the `getCardStates()` method conditionally builds the card list:
- STATS, DRAFT_POSTS, and SCHEDULED_POSTS are always added (3 cards)
- PAGES, ACTIVITY_LOG, BLAZE are conditionally added based on site capabilities
- BLOGGING_PROMPTS is conditionally added based on feature availability

So if the list only has 6 cards (indices 0-5) and code tries to access index 6 (BLOGGING_PROMPTS), it causes an `IndexOutOfBoundsException`.

**The Fix:**
Changed the `updateCardState()` method to:
1. Use `indexOfFirst { it.cardType == cardType }` to find the actual index of the card in the dynamic list
2. Add a safety check: only update if the index is >= 0 (card exists in list)
3. Update the card at its actual position, not at the `cardType.order` position

This is a minimal, targeted fix that:
- ✅ Prevents the crash by using actual list positions
- ✅ Preserves all existing functionality
- ✅ Is safe even if a card is not found in the list
- ✅ Doesn't change the behavior when cards are correctly positioned

The fix has been applied and there are no linter errors. The solution addresses the exact crash scenario described in the issue.

 45→sealed class PostListItemViewHolder(
 46→    @LayoutRes layout: Int,
 47→    parent: ViewGroup,
 48→    private val imageManager: ImageManager,
 49→    private val uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 50→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 51→    private val featuredImageView: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.image_featured)
 52→    private val titleTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.title)
 53→    private val postInfoTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.post_info)
 54→    private val statusesTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.statuses_label)
 55→    private val uploadProgressBar: ProgressBar = itemView.findViewById(R.id.upload_progress)
 56→    private val disabledOverlay: FrameLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.disabled_overlay)
 57→    private val container: ConstraintLayout = itemView.findViewById(R.id.container)
 58→    private val excerptTextView: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.excerpt)
 59→    private val moreButton: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.more)
 60→
 61→    private val selectableBackground: Drawable? = parent.context.getDrawableFromAttribute(
 62→        AndroidR.attr.selectableItemBackground
 63→    )
 64→
 65→    private val noTitle = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
 66→    /**
 67→     * Url of an image loaded in the `featuredImageView`.
 68→     */
 69→    private var loadedFeaturedImgUrl: String? = null
 70→
 71→    companion object {
 72→        var isClickEnabled = AtomicBoolean(true)
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    abstract fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState)
 76→
 77→    class Standard(
 78→        parent: ViewGroup,
 79→        imageManager: ImageManager,
 80→        uiHelpers: UiHelpers
 81→    ) : PostListItemViewHolder(R.layout.post_list_item, parent, imageManager, uiHelpers) {
 82→        override fun onBind(item: PostListItemUiState) {
 83→            setBasicValues(item.data)
 84→            setMoreActions(item.moreActions.actions)
 85→
 86→            itemView.setOnClickListener {
 87→                if (isSafeClick(it)) {
 88→                    item.onSelected.invoke()
 89→                }
 90→            }
 91→        }
 92→
 93→        // Purpose of this method is to prevent 2 Editors
 94→        // from being launched simultaneously and then producing a crash
 95→        private fun isSafeClick(view: View): Boolean {
 96→            if (isClickEnabled.getAndSet(false)) {
 97→                view.postDelayed({
 98→                    isClickEnabled.set(true)
 99→                }, 1000)
100→                return true
101→            }
102→            return false
103→        }
104→    }
105→
106→    protected fun setBasicValues(data: PostListItemUiStateData) {
107→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(titleTextView, data.title)
108→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(excerptTextView, data.excerpt)
109→        updatePostInfoLabel(postInfoTextView, data.postInfo)
110→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(statusesTextView, data.statuses.isNotEmpty())
111→        updateStatusesLabel(statusesTextView, data.statuses, data.statusesDelimiter, data.statusesColor)
112→        showFeaturedImage(data.imageUrl)
113→        updateProgressBarState(data.progressBarUiState)
114→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(disabledOverlay, data.showOverlay)
115→        if (data.disableRippleEffect) {
116→            container.background = null
117→        } else {
118→            container.background = selectableBackground
119→        }
120→
121→        if ((data.title != null && data.title != noTitle) && data.excerpt != null) {
122→            titleTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
123→            excerptTextView.maxLines = MAX_TITLE_EXCERPT_LINES
124→            titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.addOnPreDrawListener(object : ViewTreeObserver.OnPreDrawListener {
125→                override fun onPreDraw(): Boolean {
126→                    // Remove the listener to avoid multiple callbacks
127→                    titleTextView.viewTreeObserver.removeOnPreDrawListener(this)
128→
129→                    // Get the layout of the title text
130→                    val titleLayout = titleTextView.layout
131→
132→                    // Check if the title occupies more than 2 lines
133→                    when (titleLayout.lineCount) {
134→                        1 -> {
135→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 2
136→                        }
137→                        else -> {
138→                            excerptTextView.maxLines = 1
139→                            titleTextView.maxLines = 2
140→                        }
141→                    }
142→                    return true
143→                }
144→            })
145→        }
146→    }
147→
148→    protected fun setMoreActions(actions: List<PostListItemAction>) {
149→        moreButton.expandTouchTargetArea(R.dimen.post_list_more_button_extra_padding)
150→        moreButton.setOnClickListener { onMoreClicked(actions, moreButton) }
151→    }
152→
153→    private fun updatePostInfoLabel(view: TextView, uiStrings: List<UiString>?) {
154→        val concatenatedText = uiStrings?.joinToString(separator = "  ·  ") {
155→            uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it)
156→        }
157→        uiHelpers.setTextOrHide(view, concatenatedText)
158→    }
159→
160→    protected fun onMoreClicked(actions: List<PostListItemAction>, v: View) {
161→        val menu = PopupMenu(v.context, v)
162→        actions.forEach { singleItemAction ->
163→            val menuItem = menu.menu.add(
164→                Menu.NONE,
165→                singleItemAction.buttonType.value,
166→                Menu.NONE,
167→                getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(v.context, singleItemAction)
168→            )
169→            menuItem.setOnMenuItemClickListener {
170→                singleItemAction.onButtonClicked.invoke(singleItemAction.buttonType)
171→                true
172→            }
173→        }
174→        menu.show()
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun updateProgressBarState(progressBarUiState: ProgressBarUiState) {
178→        uiHelpers.updateVisibility(uploadProgressBar, progressBarUiState.visibility)
179→        when (progressBarUiState) {
180→            is ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate -> uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = true
181→            is ProgressBarUiState.Determinate -> {
182→                uploadProgressBar.isIndeterminate = false
183→                uploadProgressBar.progress = progressBarUiState.progress
184→            }
185→            is ProgressBarUiState.Hidden -> Unit // Do nothing
186→        }
187→    }
188→
189→    private fun updateStatusesLabel(
190→        view: TextView,
191→        statuses: List<UiString>,
192→        delimiter: UiString,
193→        @ColorRes color: Int?
194→    ) {
195→        val separator = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, delimiter)
196→        view.text = statuses.joinToString(separator) { uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(view.context, it) }
197→        color?.let { statusColor ->
198→            view.setTextColor(
199→                ContextCompat.getColor(
200→                    itemView.context,
201→                    statusColor
202→                )
203→            )
204→        }
205→    }
206→
207→    private fun showFeaturedImage(imageUrl: String?) {
208→        if (!imageUrl.isNullOrBlank() && imageUrl == loadedFeaturedImgUrl) {
209→            // Suppress blinking as the media upload progresses
210→            return
211→        }
212→        if (imageUrl.isNullOrBlank()) {
213→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.GONE
214→            imageManager.cancelRequestAndClearImageView(featuredImageView)
215→        } else {
216→            featuredImageView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
217→            imageManager.loadImageWithCorners(
218→                featuredImageView,
219→                ImageType.PHOTO_ROUNDED_CORNERS,
220→                imageUrl,
221→                uiHelpers.getPxOfUiDimen(
222→                    WordPress.getContext(),
223→                    UiDimen.UIDimenRes(R.dimen.my_site_post_item_image_corner_radius)
224→                )
225→            )
226→        }
227→        loadedFeaturedImgUrl = imageUrl
228→    }
229→
230→    private fun setTint(context: Context, drawable: Drawable, color: Int): Drawable {
231→        val wrappedDrawable: Drawable = DrawableCompat.wrap(drawable)
232→        if (color != 0) {
233→            val iconColor = context.getColorFromAttribute(color)
234→            DrawableCompat.setTint(wrappedDrawable, iconColor)
235→        }
236→        return wrappedDrawable
237→    }
238→
239→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod")
240→    private fun getMenuItemTitleWithIcon(context: Context, item: PostListItemAction): SpannableStringBuilder {
241→        var icon: Drawable? = setTint(
242→            context,
243→            ContextCompat.getDrawable(context, item.buttonType.iconResId)!!, item.buttonType.colorAttrId
244→        )
245→        // If there's no icon, we insert a transparent one to keep the title aligned with the items which have icons.
246→        if (icon == null) icon = ColorDrawable(Color.TRANSPARENT)
247→        val iconSize: Int = context.resources.getDimensionPixelSize(R.dimen.menu_item_icon_size)
248→        icon.setBounds(0, 0, iconSize, iconSize)
249→        val imageSpan = ImageSpan(icon)
250→
251→        // Add a space placeholder for the icon, before the title.
252→        val menuTitle = context.getText(item.buttonType.textResId)
253→        val ssb = SpannableStringBuilder(
254→            menuTitle.padStart(menuTitle.length + POST_LIST_ICON_PADDING)
255→        )
256→
257→        // Replace the space placeholder with the icon.
258→        ssb.setSpan(imageSpan, 1, 2, 0)
259→        return ssb
260→    }
261→}
262→

1→package org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts

 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.LocalOrRemoteId.RemoteId
 11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus
 14→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.post.PostStatus.DRAFT
